channel.title: Well-being on Nils Myszkowski, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Well-being on Nils Myszkowski, PhD

item.title: Exploring the Elicitors of Happiness in India
item.description: What it’s about In this paper, we examine exploring the elicitors of happiness in india. Abstract This paper examines the focal construct and reports empirical and/or psychometric evidence relevant to its interpretation. The findings contribute to the literature by clarifying measurement, theoretical implications, and practical applications in context. How to access the paper Go to the journal page for this article here. Download the PDF here.
